/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libansilove.so.1 -o libansilove.so.1.4.2 CMakeFiles/objlib.dir/src/clean.c.o CMakeFiles/objlib.dir/src/drawchar.c.o CMakeFiles/objlib.dir/src/fonts.c.o CMakeFiles/objlib.dir/src/error.c.o CMakeFiles/objlib.dir/src/loadfile.c.o CMakeFiles/objlib.dir/src/init.c.o CMakeFiles/objlib.dir/src/output.c.o CMakeFiles/objlib.dir/src/savefile.c.o CMakeFiles/objlib.dir/compat/strtonum.c.o CMakeFiles/objlib.dir/src/loaders/ansi.c.o CMakeFiles/objlib.dir/src/loaders/artworx.c.o CMakeFiles/objlib.dir/src/loaders/binary.c.o CMakeFiles/objlib.dir/src/loaders/icedraw.c.o CMakeFiles/objlib.dir/src/loaders/pcboard.c.o CMakeFiles/objlib.dir/src/loaders/tundra.c.o CMakeFiles/objlib.dir/src/loaders/xbin.c.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgd.so -lm
